title: Birthday Wishes
name: Darya Ashurkevich
message: Thank you all for the wonderful birthday wishes! Your kind messages mean so much to me. 💜

title: Birthday Celebration
name: Pavel Savinskiy
teamNote: Head of Design and Creative Operations

title: AI & Automation Specialist Joins
name: Roman Loboda
quote: I'm excited to join Appodeal working with Pavel. My background is in software engineering and startups, focused on using AI and automation to reduce manual work, organize messy processes, and make operations run more efficiently.

title: Senior Solution Architect Onboard
name: Shayan Manouchehri
quote: I'm super excited to join the team! I'm from Barcelona and spent the last few years at Criteo. I'm really looking forward to getting started and learning from all of you. I'm a proud cat owner and love exploring the city!

title: Data Excellence
reason: Outstanding data engineering work that drives our analytics forward

title: Data Science Impact
reason: Exceptional data science contributions that advance our ML capabilities

title: Team Excellence
reason: Outstanding collaborative effort across multiple teams delivering exceptional results

title: Cross-Team Success
reason: Excellent cross-functional collaboration driving product and engineering excellence

title: AI Onboarding Excellence
headline: Structured AI Team Integration
description: New AI & Automation Analysts are following our comprehensive onboarding protocol — weekly leadership updates, gradual GitHub integration, and real-time dashboard access for immediate productivity.

title: MGP Exchange Momentum
headline: Q2 Roadmap Taking Shape
description: MGP team driving toward 80% house rate while finalizing Q2 PRDs focused on platform development, data quality, AI agents, and runtime support. Strong exchange net revenue performance continues.
takeaway: Strategic focus on key results accountability driving measurable progress

title: Gaming Performance Surge
headline: Minesweeper Scaling Success
description: User acquisition hitting $150k weekly spend with impressive 240% ROAS. Strong creative performance and stable efficiency ratios demonstrate our gaming division's momentum.

title: Rewarded Games Innovation
headline: Enhanced ROI Model Validated
description: Rewarded games model showing strong results with $2 ad spend yielding $3 revenue. Players earn vouchers for milestones while we share ad revenue as loyalty rewards.
takeaway: New monetization approach improving user acquisition costs and engagement

title: Operational Streamlining
headline: Payment Pipeline Automation
description: Multi-stage payment pipeline successfully aggregating daily data across internal and external systems. Manual reconciliation maintaining under 5% variance while automation testing progresses.

title: Chardonnay Q1 Success
headline: Strong Quarter Performance
description: Team health rate over 80% with Q1 profit increased by 30%. March delivered additional $12k profit while maintaining focus on automation and GitHub activity tracking.
takeaway: Healthy growth trajectory setting foundation for Q2 maintenance initiatives

title: Communication Update
description: All newcomer introductions will be shared in the dedicated channel to keep general communication clean and ensure important updates don't get lost. Every newcomer remains a valued part of our growing team.

title: Family Strength
headline: Community Support During Challenges
quote: Thank you everyone who supported me over this last week. My daughter is recovering at home and expected to recover completely. I'm feeling better but taking it one day at a time.
author: Pavel Golubev
reactions: 144 hearts, prayers, and hugs from the team

title: AI-First Operations
headline: Every Employee Managing AI Agents
description: Strategic vision accelerating toward reality — each team member will manage 5-10 AI agents within 3-6 months. Our OKR Auditor already checks 1,000+ individual OKRs daily while Daria AI Bot saves $4k weekly analyzing app reviews.

title: Gaming Profitability Achievement
headline: Infinite Minesweeper Exceeds Benchmarks
description: Gaming division achieved profitability in 2025 with Infinite Minesweeper hitting 61% retention (Apple benchmark ERA: 151-160%). Solitaire v540 showing +21.67% D7 retention improvement.
takeaway: Strategic product optimization delivering measurable user engagement gains

title: Fraud Prevention Success
headline: Dynamic Security Reduces Risk
description: Fraud dramatically reduced from 22% to under 4% through implementation of dynamic SDK signatures. This security enhancement protects revenue while maintaining user experience quality.

title: Sales Team Momentum
headline: Strong Weekly Performance
description: Sales team closed 8 deals generating $390k net revenue in a single week, demonstrating strong market traction and effective client relationship management.
takeaway: Consistent execution driving revenue growth across multiple client segments
